column1: 健康でさえあれば、他のことは何とかなる。
column2: けんこうでさえあれば、たのことはなにとかなる。
column3: As long as you have your health, everything else will work out.
column4: さえ～ば (if only ~ / as long as ~ / all that's needed is)
column5: Verb[ば-form] + さえ + すれば / Noun + さえ + あれば
column6: expressing that one minimal condition is all that's needed for a result; 'if only X, then everything is fine'
column8: さえ-ば = minimal sufficient condition (if only this one thing); だけで = just with; ば = if (general conditional); さえ = even (without condition clause)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:さえ-ば source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:standard
